content.situation: 在申请留学签证时，签证官询问你的经济来源，你需要清晰说明资金由谁提供并提及支持文件
content.speakerText: Can you explain how you'll cover your tuition and living expenses?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能解释一下你如何支付学费和生活费吗？
content.responseTemplate: My ___ are supporting me financially, and I have the bank statements to show it.
content.hint: 通常由直系亲属提供资金支持，需配合银行流水证明
content.knowledgePoint: 表达资金来源的常见主体 + 支持文件提及

content.situation: 在面谈中被问及资金构成，你需要说明是奖学金和家庭共同承担
content.speakerText: Is your funding coming from one source or multiple?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的资金是来自单一来源还是多个来源？
content.responseTemplate: It's a combination of a ___ and my family's support.
content.hint: 奖学金是常见且可信的资金来源，常与家庭支持并列提及
content.knowledgePoint: 复合资金来源的表达结构

content.situation: 签证官要求你说明是否有贷款支持你的学业，你需要正面回应并确认文件已备好
content.speakerText: Do you have any educational loans to help with your costs?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有教育贷款来帮助支付费用吗？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, I took out a ___ and I have the approval letter ready.
content.hint: 贷款是合法资金来源之一，需提供官方批准文件
content.knowledgePoint: 提及贷款时的正确术语与配套文件
